description:
You have found three encrypted archive volumes in '/home/ga/Volumes/' named 'archive_A.hc', 'archive_B.hc', and 'archive_C.hc'. All use the password 'SortMe2024'.

Your goal is to inspect their contents to identify which volume contains financial records and which contains legal contracts.

Once identified:
1. Mount the volume containing 'financial_records.csv' to Slot 11 (so it mounts at /media/veracrypt11).
2. Mount the volume containing 'legal_contract.txt' to Slot 22 (so it mounts at /media/veracrypt22).
3. Leave the third volume (containing obsolete notes) unmounted.

Note: You will need to mount the volumes to inspect them, then dismount and remount them to the correct slots.
